38.html:
FACT: Arizona's new property tax benefit, beginning with tax year 2027, expands eligibility to disabled Veterans rated 10%–100% and TDIU recipients, removes income and home value limits, and extends benefits to eligible surviving spouses.

Full property tax exemption for qualifying 100% service-connected Veterans and TDIU recipients.

Proportional property tax reductions for eligible Veterans with disability ratings from 10%–90%.

Eligible surviving spouses may continue receiving the benefit under qualifying conditions.
